item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-02 - Today's Summary
[sustained_hot] CoreBunch/Instatic (+550 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: Instatic is a modern self-hosted visual CMS - get it running in 1 minute Why it matters: Other AI 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +550，总 stars 1,930，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset (+2078 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: A comprehensive dataset of 433 fitness exercises. Each entry includes name, category, target muscle group, equipment, instructions, thumbnail image, and animation video. Why it matters: Other AI 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2078，总 stars 8,244，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] Tencent/ncnn (+22 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: ncnn is a high-performance neural network inference framework optimized for the mobile platform Why it matters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +22，前 3 日均值 7，加速度 3.1x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] automazeio/ccpm (+4 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: CCPM is an Agent Skill that turns AI coding agents into structured project managers using GitHub Issues and parallel Git worktrees for spec-driven, multi-agent development. Why it matters: With 8,166 stars, a 7-day average delta of 2.4, and a sudden acceleration to 2.4 (high), CCPM is experiencing a breakout. The 24-hour delta of 4 and 7-day delta of 17 indicate sustained, accelerating interest. This is not a flash spike but a rapidly growing project with strong community signals. Developer insight: This signals a shift from ad-hoc AI coding to disciplined, spec-driven development. The emphasis on 'no vibe coding' and full traceability suggests that the next frontier for AI coding tools is not just code generation but project management and accountability. Developers should watch for similar patterns in other tools. Risk: Medium

item.title: [sudden_breakout] PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules (+34 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: A curated collection of .mdc configuration files that customize Cursor AI editor behavior for specific frameworks, libraries, and workflows. Why it matters: The repo has 39,842 stars and is accelerating sharply: 30 stars in the last 24 hours, 125 in the last 7 days, with a 7-day average of 16 stars/day and a 3-day average of 10.7 stars/day. The acceleration ratio of 2.8 (high) and the 'sudden_breakout' trend type indicate a recent spike in attention, likely driven by the growing adoption of Cursor AI and the need for project-specific rules. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'AI configuration as a shared asset' — teams are treating AI behavior as something that can be version-controlled, reviewed, and optimized just like code. Expect more curated rule collections and possibly a marketplace for AI editor rules. Risk: Medium

item.title: [sudden_breakout] stas00/ml-engineering (+15 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: Machine Learning Engineering Open Book Why it matters: RAG / Knowledge Base 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +15，前 3 日均值 5.7，加速度 2.6x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看数据接入、检索质量和 production workflow，而不是只看 demo 效果。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] google-ai-edge/mediapipe (+34 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: Cross-platform, customizable ML solutions for live and streaming media. Why it matters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +34，前 3 日均值 14.7，加速度 2.3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] HKUDS/Vibe-Trading (+1181 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent" Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1181，前 3 日均值 580，加速度 2x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+2151 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2151，总 stars 48,190，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Unclecheng-li/VulnClaw (+307 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: 基于 AI Agent + MCP 工具链 + 渗透 Skill 编排， 配合大语言模型， 自然语言输入 → 自动完成「信息收集 → 漏洞发现 → 漏洞利用 → 报告生成」全流程。 Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +307，总 stars 1,543，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+1891 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1891，总 stars 30,743，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] 0xNyk/council-of-high-intelligence (+534 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: 18 AI personas deliberate your hardest decisions across multiple LLM providers. Aristotle, Feynman, Kahneman, Torvalds & more — structured multi-round deliberation with genuine model diversity. One command: /council Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +534，总 stars 2,552，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
